3307850.name: Ultimate Candy Hunt
3307850.description:
Photosensitivity Warning: Flashing Lights

Stereo Sound Required - Headphones Recommended

---

It's the last week of October, and you wake up to find a list of candies waiting for you on the kitchen counter. Thus begins "Ultimate Candy Hunt," the annual candy scavenger hunt that your dad has set up for you since you were four.

Over the next week you'll explore every nook and cranny of your family farm, locate and collect elusive candies, and dodge pesky potholes and sprinklers all in your quest to finish your list as fast as you can.

Just whatever you do, stay inside at night.

---

Features:

  • Seven unique days of candy hunting, each more challenging than the last.

  • Bonus candies and bonus points: the faster you go, the more you'll gain.

  • A variety of minigames.

  • 17 unique candies.

  • 6 unique obstacles.

  • 1 pumpkin.
3307850.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
